assemblykor - Handover (2026-03-07)

Source: HANDOVER_2026_03_07.md

Project Overview

assemblykor is an R package providing curated Korean National Assembly datasets for teaching quantitative methods in political science. Korean politics counterpart to palmerpenguins.

  • Version: 0.1.0
  • Repository: https://github.com/kyusik-yang/assemblykor
  • License: MIT (code), data licenses vary (see README)
  • Local path: /Volumes/kyusik-ssd/kyusik-research/projects/assemblykor/

Package Contents

7 Built-in Datasets

Dataset Records Scope
legislators 947 20-22대 의원 메타데이터
bills 60,925 20-22대 법안 메타데이터
wealth 2,928 재산신고 패널 (13 시점)
seminars 5,962 정책세미나 활동 패널
speeches 15,843 22대 과방위 회의록 전수
votes 7,997 본회의 표결 (20-22대)
roll_calls 368,210 22대 개별 의원 표결

7 Exported Functions

  1. get_bill_texts() - 제안이유 텍스트 다운로드 (60,925건, ~40MB parquet)
  2. get_proposers() - 공동발의 기록 다운로드 (769,773건, ~25MB parquet)
  3. list_tutorials() - 튜토리얼 목록
  4. run_tutorial(name) - learnr 인터랙티브 실행
  5. open_tutorial(name) - Rmd 복사
  6. path_to_file(file) - CSV 파일 경로
  7. set_ko_font() - ggplot2 한글 폰트 자동 설정

6 Korean-language Tutorials

# Topic Key Methods
1 R 기초와 tidyverse dplyr 핵심 함수, 파이프, join
2 ggplot2 시각화 막대, 히스토그램, 산점도, facet
3 회귀분석 OLS, 다중회귀, 로그 변환, 상호작용
4 패널 데이터와 고정효과 Pooled OLS vs FE, 양방향 FE, DiD
5 텍스트 분석 입문 키워드 빈도, TF-IDF, 위원회 비교
6 네트워크 분석 공동발의 네트워크, 중심성, 커뮤니티

Two formats: interactive browser (learnr) and plain Rmd (RStudio editing).

Development History (2026-03-07)

All 13 commits on a single day. Key milestones:

  1. Initial release v0.1.0 (speeches, 6 tutorials, CSV, helpers)
  2. member_id linking for seminars/speeches
  3. Speeches expanded to all 37 committees, 16-22대
  4. Speeches scoped back to 22대 과방위 (package size)
  5. 국정감사 speeches added
  6. Votes + roll_calls + learnr interactive tutorials added
  7. %>% pipe standardization + startup message
  8. set_ko_font() helper
  9. Custom CSS theme (Catppuccin Mocha dark) for learnr
  10. CSS injection fix: htmltools::includeCSS() for inline embedding

Completed This Session

  • CSS rendering fix: learnr tutorials used relative CSS path (../css/) which failed in Shiny’s restricted file serving. Fixed by switching to htmltools::includeCSS(system.file(...)) for inline embedding. All 6 tutorials patched (commit cae933c).
  • n_bills clarification: Tutorial 1 now explains that n_bills is the sum of lead-proposed and co-sponsored bills, not just lead proposals. Added context in the data introduction (Section 1) and before the mutate example (Section 4).

Uncommitted Changes

  1. inst/tutorials/01-tidyverse-basics/01-tidyverse-basics.Rmd - n_bills 설명 추가
  2. inst/tutorials/css/assemblykor.css - (확인 필요)

Technical Notes

  • CSS theming: Custom dark theme (652 lines), Catppuccin Mocha inspired. Fonts: Inter (UI), JetBrains Mono (code). Uses htmltools::includeCSS() in each tutorial Rmd, not YAML css: parameter.
  • Data pipeline: data-raw/prepare_data.R (R) + process_*.py (Python). Raw source files (.gitignored): speeches_all_committees.csv (3.1GB), speeches_full.parquet (1.4GB), roll_calls_raw.csv (44MB).
  • Dependencies: arrow required only for download functions. Core package depends only on base R + utils.
  • LazyData: Compressed with xz. Package install includes all 7 .rda files.

Known Data Characteristics

  • n_bills in legislators: includes co-sponsorship. Median 702, max 4,198. Can surprise students expecting only lead-proposed bills.
  • n_bills_lead: lead proposals only. Median 56, max 696.
  • 661 unique legislators across 947 rows (some serve multiple assemblies).
  • wealth unit: thousands of KRW (divide by 1,000,000 for billions).
  • roll_calls API only available for 22대.

Next Steps
